sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْمُهِمِّ حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Važno je zaštititi naše lične podatke na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: It is important to protect our personal information on the internet.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَسْتَخْدِمَ كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةً لِكُلِّ حِسَابَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Moramo koristiti jake lozinke za sve naše račune.
sentences.translationEn: We must use strong passwords for all our accounts.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الْأَمْنُ السَّيْبِرَانِيُّ فِي مَنْعِ سَرِقَةِ الْبَيَانَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Kibersigurnost pomaže u sprečavanju krađe podataka.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity helps in preventing data theft.
